requirement: Self-monitoring ingestion pipeline + intelligence platform self-improvement (3 plans, 2 repos)

deterministic-plan.top: Plan specified 200 labeled queries but didn't specify generation method for bootstrap
deterministic-plan.prevention: Plan should specify bootstrap vs growth-phase dataset sizes separately

execute.top: Nightly CLI stubs with hardcoded values, missing LaunchAgent plist, missing cleanup script
execute.prevention: Execute skill should verify CLI commands produce real output, not stubs

quality_gate.top: Destructive git checkout in nightly script not caught by tests
quality_gate.prevention: Quality gate should check scripts for destructive git operations

pr-zero.top: Retry logic inconsistency between TemporalCodeGraph and CodeIndexer
pr-zero.prevention: PR-zero should flag inconsistent patterns across similar modules
